calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Nov-04-2019 Off Calendar

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Sep-23-2019 Continued To Nov-20-19 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

Motion For Prove-Up Hearing
Off Calendar Oct-08-2019 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This matter came on calendar this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing as to defendant River Accelerator LLC, a Delaware Limited Liability Company.
Judge: Gail Dekreon. Clerk: R. Sahatjian. Reporter: Patty Dowling CSR#53388, email: pdowling@SFTC. org
Dhaivat H. Shah, Esq. appeared for plaintiff Lifeliqe Inc., a Delaware Corporation. Mark Andersen, Co-Founder and President appeared as witness for plaintiff Lifeliqe Inc., a Delaware Corporation.
No appearance by defendant River Accelerator LLC, a Delaware Limited Liability Company.
Plaintiff's complaint for Declaratory Relief; Recission and Restitution was filed on 5/07/2019. Substitute service on River Accelerator LLC on 5/9/2019 effectuated 5/20/2019.
Default as to defendant River Accelerator LLC, a Delaware Limited Liability Company. was entered on 5/20/2019.
Doe defendants Dismissed in plaintiff's on 07/31/2019.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of plaintiff Lifeliqe Inc., a Delaware Corporation. and against the default defendant River Accelerator LLC, a Delaware Limited Liability Company, as follows:

The declaratory judgment that the Our Bet On You Agreement between Plaintiff and Defendant is void and unenforceable due to Defendant's failure to perform, and that Plaintiff owes Defendant nothing under the Our Bet On You Agreement. Defendant does not currently possess and never possessed any equity interest in Plaintiff as a result of the Our Bet On You Agreement, any oral agreement, or for any other reason. In the alternative, the Our Bet On You Agreement between Plaintiff and Defendant is rescinded.

Attorney Fees - $13,045.00
Costs - $704.50

Total - $13,749.50.

Proposed Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.
